c74object.name: fluid.stats
c74object.digest: Rolling mean and standard deviation on control inputs
c74object.description: Computes the rolling mean and sample standard deviation over a given window for multichannel control inputs.

discussion.p: Each element of the list is dealt with in parallel. This is particularly suitable for multidimensional descriptors.
Read more about fluid.stats on the learn platform.
fluid.stats is part of the Fluid Decomposition Toolkit of the FluCoMa project. For more explanations, learning material, and discussions on its musicianly uses, visit flucoma.org.

description.p: number of items in the input list

method.name: reset
method.digest: Return the object to its original state
method.description: Calling reset will change parameter values back to those the object was created with, i.e. any attribute values set in the box will be retained

description.p: Resets the internal state of the model

If the input list is a different size to inputsize then automatically resize the internal data. If the object is triggered from the high priority thread and a resize is needed, then the call will be deferred to the low priority thread and a warning will be posted to the console.
The size of the history window to use.
Enable warnings to be issued whenever a parameter value is constrained (e.g. clipped)
